violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the dairy reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Excessive inventory/boxes were observed against the walls in the stockroom. Establishments shall be kept free of excessive inventory to provide adequate space for inspection of premises for rodent activity and to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2026
The entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

3 dead mice on glue boards in the back corner of the basement have not been removed from premises. Droppings also observed in areas of the basement perimeter. Dead mice and droppings appear to be old. No areas of the stockroom or store observed to have rodent activity. Establishment has active monthly pest control. Dead mice and droppings are to be removed/cleaned in order to inspect for new activity and increase pest control as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Excessive inventory/boxes were observed in the stockroom and throughout the store. Establishments shall be kept free of clutter to provide adequate space for inspection of premises for rodent activity and to prevent harborage conditions. Inventory is stacked on U-boats in the stockroom with no space between them. U-boats/inventory are to be separated creating enough space for inspection and pest control service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
